Our AMI-Technology Assistants (AMI-TA™) orchestrate and accelerate firmware development and management workflows with the power and intelligence of AI. The AMI Linguistic Assistant (AMILiA™) represents a true game-changer for firmware developers – an intelligent chatbot that puts decades of AMI’s boot and manageability firmware knowledge at your fingertips, for productivity and performance gains at the pace of AI innovation.

Your Firmware, Orchestrated by AI

AMI-TA is an agentic AI platform designed to streamline firmware development management for OEMs, ODMs, cloud service providers (CSPs) and hyperscalers. AMI-TA completely transforms firmware management from a manual, error-prone process into a high-speed, AI-orchestrated workflow – dramatically cutting development cycles and reducing operational costs.

[/et_pb_blurb][et_pb_blurb title=”Smart Debugging and Predictive Analytics” image=”https://www.ami.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/chart-mixed-sharp-light-full.svg” image_icon_width=”50px” icon_alignment=”left” content_max_width=”90%” content_max_width_tablet=”90%” content_max_width_phone=”100%” content_max_width_last_edited=”on|phone” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” header_font=”Aptos|600|||||||” header_text_color=”#FFFFFF” header_font_size=”1.9vw” body_font=”Aptos||||||||” body_text_color=”#FFFFFF” body_line_height=”1.3em” image_icon_custom_margin=”||20px||false|false” custom_margin=”auto||||false|false” custom_padding=”50px||0px||false|false” header_font_size_tablet=”32px” header_font_size_phone=”28px” header_font_size_last_edited=”on|phone” locked=”off” global_colors_info=”{}”]

Reduce downtime throughout the development lifecycle, with AI-driven insights and proactive issue resolution during code compilation and run-time.

[/et_pb_blurb][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”1_3″ _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” background_enable_color=”off” background_color_gradient_direction=”45deg” custom_padding=”20px|20px|40px|20px|false|true” custom_padding_tablet=”20px|0px|40px|0px|false|true” custom_padding_phone=”10px|0px|30px|0px|false|true” custom_padding_last_edited=”on|tablet” custom_css_main_element=”display: flex;||flex-direction: column;||justify-content: space-between;||” border_radii=”on|15px|15px|15px|15px” border_color_all=”rgba(179,179,179,0.38)” global_colors_info=”{}” border_color_all__hover_enabled=”on|hover” border_color_all__hover=”#b3b3b3″][et_pb_blurb title=”Fully Integrated Security and Compliance” image=”https://www.ami.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/lock-keyhole-sharp-light-full.svg” image_icon_width=”50px” icon_alignment=”left” content_max_width=”90%” content_max_width_tablet=”90%” content_max_width_phone=”100%” content_max_width_last_edited=”on|phone” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” header_font=”Aptos|600|||||||” header_text_color=”#FFFFFF” header_font_size=”1.9vw” body_font=”Aptos||||||||” body_text_color=”#FFFFFF” body_line_height=”1.3em” image_icon_custom_margin=”||20px||false|false” custom_margin=”auto||||false|false” custom_padding=”0px||0px||false|false” header_font_size_tablet=”32px” header_font_size_phone=”28px” header_font_size_last_edited=”on|phone” locked=”off” global_colors_info=”{}”]

Decades of AMI Firmware Expertise at Your Fingertips

Our AMI Linguistic Assistant (AMILiA) is more than a chatbot – it’s an intelligent, living encyclopedia of AMI’s boot, manageability and security firmware knowledge that can streamline and accelerate the firmware development lifecycle to give you an undisputed competitive edge.

Unlike generic large language models (LLMs), AMILiA is trained on decades of AMI’s proprietary source code, design documents, troubleshooting logs and root cause analyses amassed from collaboration with our industry-leading silicon partners. It’s a wealth of information outside the public domain, unmatched by competitors and something that no other firmware provider can offer.

max_width_phone=”695px” max_width_last_edited=”on|desktop” module_alignment=”center” custom_margin=”10px||10px||true|false” global_colors_info=”{}”]

Reduced development time, improved code quality and streamlined debugging are within easy reach with AI-powered firmware development and management solutions from AMI. With AMI-TA and AMILiA, firmware isn’t just managed — it’s transformed into a competitive advantage.

Ready to leverage AMI’s AI firmware solutions to accelerate your firmware development and management workflows? Contact AMI today to take the next step towards the future at the pace of AI innovation.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_button button_url=”@ET-DC@eyJkeW5hbWljIjp0cnVlLCJjb250ZW50IjoicG9zdF9saW5rX3VybF9wYWdlIiwic2V0dGluZ3MiOnsicG9zdF9pZCI6IjI0MDQwNSJ9fQ==@” button_text=”Contact Us” button_alignment=”center” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _dynamic_attributes=”button_url” _module_preset=”default” custom_button=”on” button_text_size=”15px” button_text_color=”#000000″ button_border_width=”1px” button_border_radius=”50px” button_font=”Aptos|600|||||||” button_use_icon=”off” custom_margin=”20px||0px||false|false” custom_padding=”10px|50px|10px|50px|true|true” global_colors_info=”{}” button_bg_color__hover_enabled=”on|desktop” button_bg_color__hover=”#000000″ button_bg_enable_color__hover=”on” button_text_color__hover_enabled=”on|hover” button_text_color__hover=”#FFFFFF” button_border_color__hover_enabled=”on|hover” button_border_color__hover=”#000000″][/et_pb_button][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section]

excerpt.rendered: At AMI, we’ve redefined what it means to develop, manage and support firmware in the AI era.Our AMI-Technology Assistants (AMI-TA™) orchestrate and accelerate firmware development and management workflows with the power and intelligence of AI. The AMI Linguistic Assistant (AMILiA™) represents a true game-changer for firmware developers – an intelligent chatbot that puts decades of […]
